content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 5, 2002

Mr. Kevin Conroy
Foley Hoag, LLP
155 Seaport Boulevard
Boston, MA 02210

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 02-226

Dear Mr. Conroy:

Pursuant to my telephone message, we are considering your request for written advice dated August 12, 2002, to be withdrawn. That request was on behalf of an unidentified 501(c)(4) organization. As we discussed, under the Political Reform Act ("the Act")¹ and regulations, the Commission’s legal staff can only provide written advice if the name and mailing address of the person whose duties under the Act are in question are provided. (Regulation 18329(b)(2)(A).)

Please contact the Commission again if you have other questions about the Act. The Technical Assistance Division at 866-ASK-FPPC, provides telephone advice, and the Legal Division provides written advice to more specific or complicated questions.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Hyla P. Wagner
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

HPW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-226

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
